message:
🌱 Add podman-desktop: Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose mission (#1262)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-desktop-5334-compose-setup-fails-when-there-is-already-docker-compose",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-desktop: Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose",
+    "description": "Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-desktop troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-desktop deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-desktop configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant podman-desktop configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get configmap -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=podman-desktop\n```\n### Bug description\n\nFor some reason, podman-desktop failed to find docker-compose under `/usr/local/bin/docker-compose`. I don't remember how it is installed but maybe by podman-desktop since compose extension did not show setup button."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nCopy docker-compose on macos using cp command with -f option to overwrite existing file.\n\n### Screenshot / video of UI\n\nhttps://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5ba6aabd-60b1-45e2-8ab8-501e13525a1e\n\n### What issues does this PR fix or reference?\n\nFix #5334.\n\n### How to\n```yaml\nUnable to install docker-compose binary: Command execution failed with exit code 1: Command execution failed with exit code 1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Compose setup fails when there is already… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n podman-desktop --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?\n\nCopy docker-compose on macos using cp command with -f option to overwrite existing file.\n\n### Screenshot / video of UI\n\nhttps://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5ba6aabd-60b1-45e2-8ab8-501e13525a1e\n\n### What issues does this PR fix or reference?\n\nFix #5334.\n\n### How to test this PR?",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Unable to install docker-compose binary: Command execution failed with exit code 1: Command execution failed with exit code 1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+      "podman-desktop",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",

+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },
